default.title: Horizon Tech | Pūmanawa Hinonga, Kapua, me AI
default.description: Ka hoahoa a Horizon Tech me te tuku i ngā pūmanawa hinonga, ngā rongoā AI, ngā hanganga kapua, me ngā hua mamati mō ngā tīma whai rawa.

home.title: Horizon Tech | Ngā pūnaha pūkaha e tauine ana
home.description: Pūmanawa hinonga, AI/ML, hanganga kapua, me te tukunga IoT mō ngā tīma huri noa.

about.title: Mō Horizon Tech | Te Mahi me te Tīma o te Kamupene
about.description: Ako mō Horizon Tech, tā mātou mahi, me te pēhea e tuku ai mātou i ngā rongoā hangarau pānga tiketike.

team.title: Tīma | Horizon Tech Leadership and Experts
team.description: Tūtaki ki ngā kaipūkaha me ngā kaiārahi e hanga ana i ngā pūmanawa umanga me ngā pūhara kapua i Horizon Tech.

careers.title: Ngā Mahi | Hanga me Horizon Tech
careers.description: Tūhura i ngā tūranga tuwhera me te whakatipu i tō mahi me te tīma pūkaha o Horizon Tech.

contact.title: Whakapā atu ki Horizon Tech | Tīmataria tō kaupapa
contact.description: Whakapā atu ki a Horizon Tech ki te kōrerorero i tō kaupapa, ngā hiahia hangarau, me te rārangi wā tuku.

caseStudies.title: Ngā Akoranga Kēhi | Ngā Hua Hangarau Horizon
caseStudies.description: Pānuitia ngā akoranga kēhi kiritaki me ngā putanga i tukuna e Horizon Tech puta noa i ngā umanga.

blog.title: Rangitaki | Horizon Tech Insights
blog.description: Ngā kitenga hangarau, ngā akoranga tuku, me ngā tohutohu hoahoa mai i Horizon Tech.

education.title: Mātauranga | Ngā Rauemi Ako Horizon Tech
education.description: Ngā kaiārahi, ngā tohutoro, me ngā rauemi ako hangarau mai i Horizon Tech.

support.title: Tautoko | Hangarau Horizon
support.description: Tīkina ngā rauemi tautoko me ngā kōwhiringa whakapā mō ngā ratonga Horizon Tech.

privacy.title: Kaupapahere Tūmataitinga | Hangarau Horizon
privacy.description: Pānuitia te kaupapahere tūmataitinga me ngā whakaritenga parenga raraunga a Horizon Tech.

terms.title: Ngā Ture Ratonga | Hangarau Horizon
terms.description: Pānuitia ngā ture ratonga Horizon Tech mō tā mātou paetukutuku me ngā ratonga.

profile.title: Kōtaha | Hangarau Horizon
profile.description: Whakahaerehia tō kōtaha Hangarau Horizon, ngā tautuhinga, me ngā taipitopito pūkete.

firstTimeSetup.title: Tatūnga Wā Tuatahi | Hangarau Horizon
firstTimeSetup.description: Whakaotia te tatūnga pūkete wā tuatahi kia haere tonu i Horizon Tech.

forgotPassword.title: Kua Wareware te Kupuhipa | Hangarau Horizon
forgotPassword.description: Tautuhi anō i te urunga ki tō pūkete Horizon Tech.

resetPassword.title: Tautuhi Kupuhipa Anō | Hangarau Horizon
resetPassword.description: Waihangatia he kupuhipa hōu mō tō pūkete Horizon Tech.

confirmEmail.title: Whakaū Īmēra | Hangarau Horizon
confirmEmail.description: Whakaūngia tō wāhitau īmēra hei whakahohe i tō pūkete Horizon Tech.

admin.title: Paewhiri Kaiwhakahaere | Hangarau Horizon
admin.description: Mokowāmahi whakahaere mō te whakahaeretanga pūhara Horizon Tech.

unauthorized.title: Kore Mana | Hangarau Horizon
unauthorized.description: Kāore i a koe te āheitanga ki tēnei whārangi Horizon Tech i tēnei wā.

services.title: Ngā Ratonga | Hangarau Horizon
services.description: Tūhura i ngā ratonga Horizon Tech i roto i te pūkaha pūmanawa, AI, kapua, DevOps, me te panoni mamati.

innovationLab.title: Taiwhanga Hou | Hangarau Horizon
innovationLab.description: Tirohia ngā whakamātautau Horizon Tech me ngā tauira tauira i roto i te AI me te pūkaha hoatu.

authCallback.title: Takiuru Mai | Hangarau Horizon
authCallback.description: Kei te whakaoti i te takiuru haumaru mō tō pūkete Horizon Tech.
